Off Calendar Jul-05-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Alan Silverman plaintiff and oving party in Propria Persona

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Alan Silverman's motion to compel responses. Motion Granted. Defendant Valladares shall serve verified responses to plaintiff's first set of form interrogatories, special interrogatories, and request for production of documents within 14 days of the date of this Order. All objections--except attorney-client and attorney work-product privilege--are waived.

Sanctions shall issue in the sum of $500.00. Imposition of sanctions is stayed for 14 days. If defendant provides full, verified responses in compliance with this Order within 14 days, sanctions shall be stayed permanently. ORDER SIGNED. Commissioner: PAUL SLAVIT
